title: Turret Driver Subsystem Dynamic Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes of the turret driver subsystem, defining the controlled connector, rotation angle feedback output, and other runtime configuration.

definition.description: Resource location of the subsystem model, pointing to the corresponding subsystem static attribute definition file.

connector.description: Name of the controlled AdvancedConnector. The turret driver controls turret rotation through this connector's New6Dof joint.

rotation_outputs.description: Current joint angle feedback output channels and targets. Optional, sends current yaw/pitch angles (radians) to specified channels.
